data.title: Cryptocurrency Injective Up More Than 3% In 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Injective's (CRYPTO: INJ) price has risen 3.38% to $21.62. This continues its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 13.0% gain, moving from $19.02 to its current price. As it stands right now, the coin's all-time high is $52.62.

data.title: UK Experts Warn Of Dangerous NHS Medical Marijuana Trials For Epilepsy Patients, More Updates From Europe
Amicus Therapeutics Settles Patent Lawsuit Teva Pharmaceuticals Over Generic Version Of Its Rare Genetic Disorder Drug
data.description: Amicus Therapeutics enters a license agreement with Teva Pharmaceuticals resolving patent litigation over a generic version of Galafold. Teva may market its version starting in 2037, pending FDA approval. Litigation continues with Aurobindo.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Internet Computer Down More Than 3% Within 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Internet Computer's (CRYPTO: ICP) price has fallen 3.62% to $7.68. This continues its negative trend over the past week where it has experienced a 2.0% loss, moving from $7.86 to its current price.
